overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in a shaggy cloak walking through an autumn field at night under a burning red sky, approaching and entering the Church of Elleh to find a merchant by a campfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: autumn field with scattered stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the distant church ruins under the red night sky

entered.detail: dark night sky filled with swirling red and purple nebula clouds
large stone church building with tower visible in the distance
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage
tall green grass covering the ground
low crumbling stone walls scattered in the field

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open autumn field at night, surrounded by orange-leaved trees and scattered stone ruins. The sky burns with red nebula clouds as the character approaches a distant stone church.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone church entrance with arched doorway

events.description: character approaches the stone church facade and enters through the large arched doorway
screen displays 'Church of Elleh' text as character passes into the darker interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the church entrance and walking through the arched stone doorway into the building

entered.detail: weathered stone church front with arched windows and doorway
large stone archway leading into the church interior

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the stone church facade and walks through the arched doorway. The lighting shifts from the red-tinged outdoor night to the darker interior as the on-screen text identifies the location as the Church of Elleh.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined church interior with merchant camp

events.description: character approaches the lit campfire and discovers the merchant NPC inside the ruins

agents.ego_description: walking through the ruined church interior toward the merchant sitting by the campfire

notable_agents.action: merchant NPC sitting by the campfire, tending to goods on a cart

entered.detail: tall stone pillars supporting the remaining roof structure
burning campfire providing warm orange light
wooden cart with goods next to the campfire

segments.scene_description: Inside the ruined Church of Elleh, the character walks between stone columns toward a campfire where a merchant NPC sits. The red night sky is visible through the broken roof above as the character approaches the warm firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, surreal autumn field into the sheltered ruins of a stone church. It begins with the character walking through orange-leaved trees and scattered ruins under a burning red nebula sky, moving steadily toward a distant stone structure. As the character reaches the facade, the camera glides through an arched doorway, shifting the lighting from the red-tinged night to the dim, shadowed interior of the Church of Elleh. The scene then expands within the ruined sanctuary, passing between stone columns while the red sky remains visible through the broken roof above. Finally, the camera closes in on a merchant sitting by a campfire, transitioning from the cold night air into the glow of warm firelight.
